lines.text: Pony Rides | Walt Disney World Resort
LocatedinThe Campsites at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort
Introduce your junior cowboy or cowgirl to our 4-legged equine friends with an old-fashioned pony ride.
Show Safety, Accessibility and Guest Policies
Pony Rides are available at the stable near Pioneer Hall on a walk-in basis only.
Pint-sized cowpokes can climb aboard the petite ponies at Tri-Circle-D Ranch. Afterward, they may even get to see Cinderella’s Ponies!

Pony rides are offered daily at Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground with the last ride of the day 30 minutes prior to close. Riders must be at least 3 years of age, under 80 pounds, no taller than 48 inches and able to hang on by themselves. A parent or guardian must lead the pony at all times.
A fee is associated with this activity. No reservations are necessary.
Call (407) 824-2832 for information about Tri-Circle-D Ranch’s other offerings, including horseback trail rides, wagon rides and private carriage rides.
